brand_voice.persona: Hi [Name]… – friendly neighbour who knows Australian homes

prompts.prompt: Generate a 2-sentence Instagram caption for a before/after living room clean in an Australian home. Mention coastal dust, weekend guests, and eco-friendly products. Include 5 hashtags. Tone: warm, proud, not salesy.
prompts.example_output: From coastal dust to weekend-ready ✨ Your living room got the eco-touch in just 2 hours. No harsh chemicals, just pure freshness. 🌿 #AussieClean #EcoHome #BeforeAndAfter #GreenClean #CleanHome

prompts.prompt: Write a 1-sentence upsell message for adding an oven clean to a standard booking. Mention $49 price, 30 extra minutes, and the benefit (no fumes, eco-safe). Tone: helpful, not pushy.
prompts.example_output: Want to add an oven deep clean for just $49? It's 30 minutes, eco-safe, and means no fumes when you roast tonight's dinner.

prompts.scenario: Google Search Ad for cleaning services
prompts.prompt: Create 5 Google Ads headlines (max 30 chars each) for professional home cleaning in Australia. Include 'Instant Quote', 'Eco', and 'Book in 60 Sec'.

Write a 3-sentence email to a customer who last booked 8 weeks ago. Remind them of their last clean, offer 10% off their next booking, and mention the dynamic pricing feature. Tone: friendly, not guilt-tripping.
prompts.example_output: Hi [Name], it's been a while since your last AussieClean! Your home looked amazing after that session — let's do it again. Use code WELCOME10 for 10% off this week, and get an instant real-time quote before you confirm.

prompts.prompt: Write a 15-second TikTok script for a before/after cleaning transformation. Include on-screen text, voiceover line, and trending audio suggestion. Hook in first 3 seconds.
prompts.example_output:
0:00–0:03 [Text: 'Wait for it…'] [Audio: trending transition sound]
0:03–0:07 [Voiceover: 'Watch this living room go from dusty to dazzling']
0:07–0:15 [Before/after + Text: 'Instant quote in 60 sec – link in bio']

prompts.prompt: Write a 1-sentence SMS confirmation for a 2-hour eco clean. Include cleaner name, date/time, eco-product mention, and tracking link placeholder. Max 160 chars.
prompts.example_output: Hi [Name]! Jess is confirmed for your 2hr eco clean Thu 3PM. Track her arrival: [link]. See you soon! 🌿

prompts.prompt: Create an Instagram Story poll question about cleaning pain points. Offer 2 relatable options. Keep it fun.
prompts.example_output: What's the worst part of cleaning? 🤔 [Sand everywhere] vs [Sticky kitchen benches]

prompts.scenario: LinkedIn post for property manager partnerships
prompts.prompt: Write a 3-sentence LinkedIn post targeting property managers and Airbnb hosts. Highlight 24hr turnover, eco-certification, and quality guarantees. CTA: 'Partner with us'.
prompts.example_output: Airbnb hosts: what if you could guarantee 5-star cleanliness before every guest? AussieClean offers 24hr turnover cleans with eco-certified products across NSW, VIC, QLD, WA, and SA. Partner with us for priority slots + bulk pricing.

prompts.prompt: Write primary text (90 chars) and headline (40 chars) for a Facebook carousel ad showing 3 before/after rooms. Mention starting price and instant quote.
prompts.example_output:
Primary: 'See your clean before you book. From $149.'
Headline: 'Eco Clean – Instant Quote'

prompts.prompt: Write a short, friendly SMS requesting a Google review 2 hours after a clean is completed. Mention the cleaner's name and keep it under 140 chars.
prompts.example_output: Hi [Name], hope the clean looks great! If Jess did a great job, we'd love your Google review: [link] 🌟 Thank you!

prompts.prompt: Write a professional response to a 3-star review about missed spots. Apologise sincerely, offer to rectify, and maintain a warm brand tone.
prompts.example_output: Thank you for your honest feedback — we're sorry we missed some spots! We take quality seriously and would love to make it right. Please contact us at hello@aussieclean.com.au and we'll arrange a complimentary touch-up at your convenience.

prompts.prompt: Generate 3 variations of a homepage headline for a professional cleaning booking platform. Focus on speed, trust, and eco values.
example_output: Book a clean in under 60 seconds.

dynamic_pricing_copy.peak_hour: Peak-hour demand pricing applies to 4–8pm slots — book a morning or afternoon slot to save.
dynamic_pricing_copy.weekend: Weekend cleans are in high demand — prices reflect live availability.
dynamic_pricing_copy.high_demand: Prices are higher right now due to limited availability in your area. Book now to lock in this rate.
dynamic_pricing_copy.low_demand: Great news — this time slot has excellent availability. Your dynamic quote reflects a lower rate.
